texto: And yet I wasn't sure what his weakness was. We all do that as we get to know someone. Like a tabloid editor, we search for both greatness and weakness, jotting down notes in our heads for future exploitation. We are never comfortable with those who have no visible flaw.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Wayne Elise: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “And yet I wasn't sure what his weakness was. We all do that as we get to know someone. Like a tab…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, exploitation, flaws pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de flaws e weakness.
